notes: C2483 Lead directive — TWO TASKS (both confirmed unimplemented after zombie loop C2458-C2480). TASK 1: src/components/shop/product-gallery.tsx — (a) Move video to slide 1: change `videoSlideIndex = hasVideo ? images.length : -1` to `videoSlideIndex = hasVideo ? Math.min(1, images.length) : -1`. Fix image-to-index mapping: when activeIndex > videoSlideIndex use images[activeIndex-1] not images[activeIndex] (for both main display and thumbnail filmstrip). (b) Replace tap-to-play with muted autoplay: change <video> to `muted autoplay loop playsinline preload='none'`, remove videoPlaying state + onClick handler + Play overlay button. (c) Add useEffect on isVideoActive: `if (isVideoActive) videoRef.current?.play().catch(()=>{})` else `videoRef.current?.pause()`. Keep Play triangle icon on filmstrip thumbnail only. TASK 2: create src/lib/email/similar-item.ts with `sendSimilarItemNotifications(soldProducts: Product[])`: for each soldProduct — (1) parse sizes JSON, (2) query ProductNotifyRequest where categoryId=soldProduct.categoryId AND notified=false, filter by size overlap in JS, (3) query available similar products: categoryId match, active=true, sold=false, id≠soldProduct.id, take 4 orderBy createdAt desc, (4) if similarItems.length===0 SKIP — never send empty, (5) send React Email via Resend — subject `[brand] [name] je pryč — ale máme tohle`, body: sold notice + 4 product cards with image/price/link + unsubscribe, (6) mark matched requests notified=true. Wire in checkout/actions.ts AFTER line 421 (after last revalidatePath): `sendSimilarItemNotifications(products).catch(e => console.error('[Checkout] Similar notify:', e))`. Note: `products` (line 238) has full fields incl categoryId/brand/sizes/images. MUST run npm run build.

schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name → run_every integer (overrides DB value)

session_manager.kill_zombie_tasks: bool — kill tasks stuck as 'running' for >30min
session_manager.requeue_failed: list of task IDs to requeue (max 5)
session_manager.reset_no_change_counter: bool — prevent auto-pause from consecutive no-change cycles
